title: helianthemum anglicum
intro: Helianthemum anglicum, also known as rockrose or English rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum anglicum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of rockrose include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
